_comment: Project-local Aristotle job log. Each subsequent line is a JSON object: {id, status, queue, target_file, prompt_summary, submitted, integrated, notes}. Update with TaskUpdate-style entries when submitting/retrieving Aristotle jobs. Use this to distinguish JacobianChallenge jobs from other projects sharing the same Aristotle account.

prompt_summary: Discharge the sorry on map_continuous via QuotientAddGroup.isQuotientMap_mk
notes: Clean term-mode proof using IsOpenQuotientMap.isQuotientMap.continuous_iff. Restored docstring + trailing newline that Aristotle dropped.

Aristotle returned haveI+inferInstance. Hypothesis turned out to be unused because FullComplexLattice already carries quotient_t2 as an attribute instance — renamed to _h with explanatory note for future refactor.

Aristotle's proof used simp +decide chains (against proof-style guidelines). Replaced with a clean tactic proof using mk_eq_iff from Mk.lean: rw mk_eq_iff at h; rw mk_eq_iff; apply hker; rw f.map_add, f.map_neg; exact h.

notes: Four direct Mathlib citations (continuous_quotient_mk', QuotientAddGroup.mk_surjective/isOpenQuotientMap_mk/eq) + omit annotations to silence unused-typeclass warnings.

COMPLETE_WITH_ERRORS. Substantive recon: 4 of 5 fields proved (subgroup, isClosed via discreteTopology_toAddSubgroup helper, fundamentalDomain via closure of ZSpan.fundamentalDomain, fundamentalDomain_isCompact via isBounded.isCompact_closure). 5th field (covers) failed with grind; ported as sorry with sketch of packaging helper. Bridge is feasible — verdict folded into plan.md Phase 1.5b.

Clean proof using ZSpan.exist_unique_vadd_mem_fundamentalDomain + Basis.ofZLatticeBasis_span + subset_closure + abel. Wired into ZLatticeRecon.fullComplexLatticeOfZLattice — the bridge is now sorry-free.

notes: Substantive recon report — 7-section top-of-file summary + per-sorry construction outlines. Findings surfaced in plan.md Phase 1.5 block. Quotient-manifold machinery does not exist in Mathlib; hand-roll required.

prompt_summary: Discrete AddSubgroup of seminormed group has nonzero elements bounded away from zero
notes: Clean proof using `isOpen_inter_eq_singleton_of_mem_discrete` + `SetLike.isDiscrete_iff_discreteTopology` + `Metric.isOpen_iff` + `mem_ball_zero_iff`. Build green, no warnings. Three additional Mathlib imports added.

prompt_summary: mk is injective on small balls under isolation-at-zero hypothesis
notes: Clean proof: contrapose! + dist_triangle_right + linarith using QuotientAddGroup.eq_iff_sub_mem. Dropped the unused hr_pos hypothesis (r ≤ 0 case is vacuous since Metric.ball v r = ∅).

prompt_summary: Recon: cleanest discreteness packaging for FullComplexLattice
notes: Substantive recon — answers Q1-Q5. Recommendation: option (a) `isDiscrete : DiscreteTopology Λ.subgroup` as a new field. ZLatticeRecon's `discreteTopology_toAddSubgroup` bridge supplies it from `IsZLattice ℝ L`. Confirms no ZLattice ↔ discrete-cocompact-closed equivalence in Mathlib v4.28.0 (forward only).

prompt_summary: exists_chart_ball: bundled chart-prep (InjOn + IsOpen image) for any base point
notes: Aristotle followed the recipe exactly: 4-line proof — `obtain` from `exists_pos_le_norm_of_discreteTopology Λ.subgroup`, `refine ⟨δ/4, by linarith, ?_, ?_⟩`, then one-liners for each conjunct. Build green, no sorries.
Two clean term-mode one-liners: `Function.invFunOn_eq hq` and `Function.invFunOn_mem hq`. Build green, no sorries.

prompt_summary: localSection_mk: left-inverse of mk on the ball under InjOn
notes: Aristotle queue stuck for ~3h after submission (server-wide backlog visible in `aristotle list`). Per user directive, proved locally and cancelled the Aristotle job. Local proof: chain `Set.mem_image_of_mem` → `localSection_mem` → `mk_localSection` → `mk_injOn_ball_of_isolation` (5 lines, no automation).

prompt_summary: continuousOn_localSection: continuity of the local section
notes: Aristotle queue stuck for ~3h. Proved locally via continuousOn_open_iff (the source `mk '' ball v r` is open by mk_image_isOpen) + a Set.ext showing `(source ∩ localSection ⁻¹' U) = mk '' (ball v r ∩ U)` using the localSection_mk left-inverse, then mk_image_isOpen on the intersection. ~12-line proof, no automation.
